Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleArrayValidator.
    AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>
    An ExtensibleArrayValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractArrayVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleArrayValidator<V,​A,​E>,​A,​E>
    An implementation of ExtensibleArrayVerifier.
    AbstractArrayVerifierNoOp<S,​A,​E>
    An ExtensibleArrayVerifier that does nothing.
    AbstractBooleanValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleBooleanValidator.
    AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>
    An implementation of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier.
    AbstractCollectionValidator<S,​C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleCollectionValidator.
    AbstractComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    An implementation of ExtensibleComparableValidator.
    AbstractComparableValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ExtensibleComparableValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractComparableVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleComparableVerifier.
    AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ExtensibleComparableVerifier that does nothing.
    AbstractDoubleValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for doubles.
    AbstractFloatingPointValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.
    AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    AbstractFloatValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for floats.
    AbstractIntegerValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.
    AbstractNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberValidator.
    AbstractNumberValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleNumberValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractNumberVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberVerifier.
    AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleNumberVerifier that does nothing.
    AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectValidator.
    AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​T>
    An ExtensibleObjectValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<V,​T>,​T>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectVerifier.
    AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
    An ExtensibleObjectVerifier that does nothing.
    AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensiblePrimitiveNumberValidator that does nothing.
    AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier that does nothing.
